# Beach House Moving

> Locally owned, owner-operated moving, packing, storage, and delivery company on the Florida Panhandle / Emerald Coast. Four owners who are also the movers, on every job. Florida Mover Registration #IM4125 (FDACS). Open 24 hours, 7 days a week.

## About
Beach House Moving is a Service-Area Business based on the Emerald Coast of Northwest Florida. The company is owner-operated — the same 4-person team owns and runs every job, with no subcontractors. Services: residential moving, local moving, long-distance moving, packing and unpacking, secure storage, and furniture/appliance delivery. Specializes in luxury beach-home and new-construction moves, appliance and specialty-item delivery (refrigerators, washers/dryers, TVs), and military PCS relocations near Eglin AFB and Hurlburt Field. Fleet: 3 vehicles (2 box trucks with lift gates + 1 Sprinter van).

## Contact
- Phone: (850) 842-1962 | tel:+18508421962
- Email: beachhousemoving@gmail.com
- Website: https://beachhousemoving.xyz
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week
- License: Florida Mover Registration #IM4125 (FDACS Moving Services program)
- Service-Area Business — no public street address; the team travels to the customer.

## Service Area
Walton County, Okaloosa County, and Bay County, Florida, plus long-distance moves.
Key communities: Santa Rosa Beach, 30A, Grayton Beach, Blue Mountain Beach, Seaside, WaterColor, WaterSound, Seacrest Beach, Alys Beach, Rosemary Beach, Inlet Beach, Dune Allen, Seagrove Beach, Miramar Beach, Sandestin, Freeport, DeFuniak Springs, Destin, Fort Walton Beach, Niceville, Crestview, Shalimar, Bluewater Bay, Panama City, Panama City Beach, Lynn Haven.

## Key facts
- Are the owners the movers? Yes. The same 4 people who own Beach House Moving are on every job.
- Is Beach House Moving licensed and insured? Yes — FL Mover Reg. #IM4125, fully insured.
- What areas are served? Walton, Okaloosa, and Bay Counties, FL + long-distance.
- Are estimates free? Yes — no hidden fees.
- Hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
- How to book: call (850) 842-1962 or visit https://beachhousemoving.xyz.
